phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 3/9 changes DONE. C-004 surfaced that the kernel holds no operational SurrealDB session at boot — user decided config store is API-owned (D9); added process-global shared_pool() for the embedded RocksDB single-lock constraint (D10, assessment R-2). C-004 overlay reads the store + pushes into kernel at boot (seed→overlay→connect). Revised seams: C-003 seed + C-005 writes + C-006 reload all live in librefang-api via shared pool. Next C-005 -> C-003 -> C-006 -> C-007 -> C-008 -> C-009 (C-009 hard-gated on C-008 prod verify).

next_action.description: Re-target MCP/model/config-set write endpoints to ConfigStore via shared_pool; push effective list into kernel + reconnect — M, depends on C-002, C-004
